mapper.select:
/* EpbuSttus_Dao_retrieveEpbuSttusList */ WITH YEAR_MONTH_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */
TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM'), LEVEL - 1), 'yyyyMM') AS yy_mt
TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + LEVEL - 1) AS yy_mt
FROM DUAL CONNECT BY
LEVEL <= MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6), 'yyyyMM')) + 1
LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 0, 4)) - TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 4)) + 1)
), USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(BASIN DEPT BPLC USWTR_SQTY INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW YEAR_MONTH_LIST) */ YEAR_MONTH_LIST.yy_mt, BASIN.cmmn_cd AS basin_cd, BASIN.cmmn_cd_nm AS basin_nm, BASIN.sort_ordr AS basin_sort, DEPT.cmmn_cd AS dept_cd, DEPT.cmmn_cd_nm AS dept_nm, DEPT.sort_ordr AS dept_sort, BPLC.cmmn_cd AS bplc_cd, BPLC.cmmn_cd_nm AS bplc_nm, BPLC.sort_ordr AS bplc_sort, USWTR_SQTY.cmmn_cd AS uswtr_sqty_cd, USWTR_SQTY.cmmn_cd_nm AS uswtr_sqty_nm, USWTR_SQTY.disc_fclty_no AS uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no, USWTR_SQTY.anlrpt_bplc_no AS uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no, USWTR_SQTY.anlrpt_bplc_seq AS uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_seq, USWTR_SQTY.sort_ordr AS uswtr_sqty_sort, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.cmmn_cd AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.cmmn_cd_nm AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_nm, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.sort_ordr AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_sort FROM ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1000' ) BASIN, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2001' ) DEPT, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2002' AND usr_dfn_vu2 != 'N' ) BPLC, ( SELECT A.cmmn_cd, MAX(A.cmmn_cd_nm) AS cmmn_cd_nm, MAX(A.upper_cls_cd) AS upper_cls_cd, MAX(A.upper_cmmn_cd) AS upper_cmmn_cd, /* ( SELECT fnct_lc_dtls FROM WFM.tm_zc10001 WHERE fnct_lc_no = A.cmmn_cd ) AS bplc_fnct_lc_nm, */ MAX(B.dstrct_hq_cd) AS dstrct_hq_cd, MAX(B.plnt_no) AS plnt_no, MAX(B.disc_fclty_no) AS disc_fclty_no, C.anlrpt_bplc_no, C.anlrpt_bplc_seq, MAX(A.sort_ordr) AS sort_ordr FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2010' ) A, WRO.ti_pg20058 B, WRO.ti_pg20060 C WHERE A.cmmn_cd = B.bplc_fnct_lc_no AND B.bplc_fnct_lc_no = C.bplc_fnct_lc_no GROUP BY A.cmmn_cd, C.anlrpt_bplc_no, C.anlrpt_bplc_seq ) USWTR_SQTY, ( SELECT cls_cd, cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, upper_cls_cd, upper_cmmn_cd, sort_ordr FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2011' ) INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW, YEAR_MONTH_LIST WHERE USWTR_SQTY.upper_cls_cd(+) = BPLC.cls_cd AND USWTR_SQTY.upper_cmmn_cd(+) = BPLC.cmmn_cd AND INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.upper_cls_cd(+) = BPLC.cls_cd AND INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW.upper_cmmn_cd(+) = BPLC.cmmn_cd AND BPLC.upper_cls_cd = DEPT.cls_cd AND BPLC.upper_cmmn_cd = DEPT.cmmn_cd AND DEPT.upper_cls_cd = BASIN.cls_cd AND DEPT.upper_cmmn_cd = BASIN.cmmn_cd
AND BASIN.cmmn_cd = #{ecsBasinDivCd}
AND DEPT.cmmn_cd = #{ecsChrgDeptId}
AND BPLC.usr_dfn_vu1 = ( SELECT usr_dfn_vu2 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1003' AND cmmn_cd = #{ecsCnstscDivCd} )
ORDER BY basin_sort, dept_sort, bplc_sort, uswtr_sqty_sort, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd_sort ), USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ B.yy_mt, A.bplc_cd, A.uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no, A.uswtr_sqty_nm, B.dail_bplc_sqty AS uswtr_sqty FROM ( SELECT uswtr_sqty_cd, MAX(bplc_cd) AS bplc_cd, MAX(uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no) AS uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no, uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no AS uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no, MAX(uswtr_sqty_nm) AS uswtr_sqty_nm FROM USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST GROUP BY uswtr_sqty_cd, uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no ) A, ( SELECT
SUBSTR(suply_de, 0, 6) AS yy_mt,
SUBSTR(suply_de, 0, 4) AS yy_mt,
anlrpt_bplc_no, ROUND(NVL(SUM(dail_bplc_sqty), 0), 0) AS dail_bplc_sqty FROM WRO.ts_pge4901 WHERE
suply_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '01' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '31'
suply_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '1231'
AND (anlrpt_bplc_no, anlrpt_bplc_seq) IN ( SELECT DISTINCT uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no, uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_seq FROM USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST WHERE USWTR_SQTY_ANLRPT_BPLC_NO IS NOT NULL ) GROUP BY
SUBSTR(suply_de, 0, 6),
SUBSTR(suply_de, 0, 4),
anlrpt_bplc_no ) B WHERE A.uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no = B.anlrpt_bplc_no ), INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(A B) */ A.yy_mt, A.bplc_cd, NVL(SUM(B.msmt_vu), 0) AS inhouse_cnsmp_snpw FROM ( SELECT yy_mt, MAX(bplc_cd) AS bplc_cd, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd FROM USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST GROUP BY yy_mt, inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd ) A, ( SELECT
SUBSTR(obsr_de, 0, 6) AS yy_mt,
SUBSTR(obsr_de, 0, 4) AS yy_mt,
tag_seq, SUM(msmt_vu) AS msmt_vu FROM WRO.ti_rwis_dd WHERE tag_seq IN ( SELECT DISTINCT inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd FROM USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST )
AND obsr_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '01' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '31'
AND obsr_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '1231'
GROUP BY
SUBSTR(obsr_de, 0, 6),
SUBSTR(obsr_de, 0, 4),
tag_seq ) B WHERE A.inhouse_cnsmp_snpw_cd = B.tag_seq(+) AND A.yy_mt = B.yy_mt GROUP BY A.yy_mt, A.bplc_cd ), MAPPING_LIST AS ( SELECT yy_mt, MAX(basin_cd) AS basin_cd, MAX(basin_nm) AS basin_nm, MAX(basin_sort) AS basin_sort, MAX(dept_cd) AS dept_cd, MAX(dept_nm) AS dept_nm, MAX(dept_sort) AS dept_sort, bplc_cd, MAX(bplc_nm) AS bplc_nm, MAX(uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no) AS uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no, MAX(bplc_sort) AS bplc_sort FROM USWTR_SQTY_MAPPING_LIST GROUP BY yy_mt, bplc_cd ORDER BY basin_sort, dept_sort, bplc_sort ), CNSTQY_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */
SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) AS yy_mt, ROUND(SUM(NVL(DECODE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 5, 2), '01', jan, '02', feb, '03', mar, '04', apr, '05', may, '06', jun, '07', jul, '08', agu, '09', sep, '10', oct, '11', nov, '12', dec, dec), 0)), 0) AS sum,
yy AS yy_mt, ROUND(SUM(NVL(tot_usgqty, 0)), 0) AS sum,
dscfc_id, MAX(dscfc_nm) AS dscfc_nm, MAX(dscfc_bplc_cd) AS dscfc_bplc_cd, MAX(dscfc_procs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_procs_ty_cd FROM (
) WHERE yy IS NOT NULL AND dscfc_procs_ty_cd IN ('01', '02', '03') /* 취수시설, 가압시설, 정수시설 */ GROUP BY yy, dscfc_id ), KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE */ dscfc_id,
dscfc_use_de,
SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 4) AS dscfc_use_de,
NVL(SUM(tot_amt), 0) AS tot_amt FROM ( SELECT dscfc_id, SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6) AS dscfc_use_de, MAX(dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, CASE WHEN SUM(dscfc_usgqty) < 0 AND SUM(tot_amt) > 0 THEN SUM(tot_amt) * -1 ELSE SUM(tot_amt) END AS tot_amt FROM ( SELECT dscfc_id, dscfc_use_de, dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, dscfc_use_slip_no, CASE WHEN max_abs_dscfc_usgqty = 0 AND count_dscfc_use_slip_no > 1 THEN max_tot_amt / count_dscfc_use_slip_no WHEN dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd != 0 AND (dscfc_usgqty != 0 OR count_dscfc_use_slip_no > 1) THEN (dscfc_usgqty / DECODE(NVL(sum_dscfc_usgqty, 0), 0, 1, sum_dscfc_usgqty)) * max_tot_amt ELSE tot_amt END AS tot_amt, dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT dscfc_id, dscfc_use_de, dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(tot_amt, 0) AS tot_amt, MAX(NVL(tot_amt, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY dscfc_use_slip_no) AS max_tot_amt, NVL(dscfc_usgqty, 0) AS dscfc_usgqty, SUM(NVL(dscfc_usgqty, 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY dscfc_use_slip_no) AS sum_dscfc_usgqty, COUNT(dscfc_use_slip_no) OVER(PARTITION BY dscfc_use_slip_no) AS count_dscfc_use_slip_no, MAX(NVL(ABS(dscfc_usgqty), 0)) OVER(PARTITION BY dscfc_use_slip_no) AS max_abs_dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(ABC.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, NVL(MAX(ABC.tot_amt), 0) AS tot_amt, NVL(MAX(ABC.dscfc_usgqty), 0) AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd) AS dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, MAX(AA.dscfc_use_slip_no) AS dscfc_use_slip_no, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.tot_amt) END AS tot_amt, CASE WHEN AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001') THEN MAX(AA.dscfc_usgqty) END AS dscfc_usgqty FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.dscfc_id, A.dscfc_use_de, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm, A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd, A.dscfc_use_slip_no, A.tot_amt, A.dscfc_usgqty FROM GHG.tm_rq01103 A, GHG.tm_gg01104 B WHERE ( (A.dscfc_use_slip_no IS NOT NULL AND A.dscfc_use_slip_no NOT LIKE 'TMP%') OR A.dscfc_use_slip_prcs_ty_cd = '1' ) AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id IN ('2005', '2001')
AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '01' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '31'
AND A.dscfc_use_de BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '0101' AND ( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ) || '1231'
AND A.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id = B.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id ) AA GROUP BY AA.dscfc_id, AA.dscfc_use_de, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_id, AA.dsqty_cfrml_parm_nm ) ABC GROUP BY ABC.dscfc_id, ABC.dscfc_use_de ) ) ) GROUP BY SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 6), dscfc_id ) GROUP BY dscfc_id,
dscfc_use_de
SUBSTR(dscfc_use_de, 0, 4)
), DR_DATA_LIST AS ( SELECT /*+ MATERIALZE LEADING(MAPPING_LIST A B) */
SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 0, 6) AS yy_mt, DECODE(SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 5, 2), '01', NVL(A.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon01_iem_vu, 0), '02', NVL(A.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon02_iem_vu, 0), '03', NVL(A.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon03_iem_vu, 0), '04', NVL(A.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon04_iem_vu, 0), '05', NVL(A.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon05_iem_vu, 0), '06', NVL(A.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon06_iem_vu, 0), '07', NVL(A.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon07_iem_vu, 0), '08', NVL(A.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon08_iem_vu, 0), '09', NVL(A.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon09_iem_vu, 0), '10', NVL(A.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon10_iem_vu, 0), '11', NVL(A.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon11_iem_vu, 0), '12', NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0), NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0)) AS excclc_amt_total,
MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt, ( NVL(A.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon01_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon02_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon03_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon04_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon05_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon06_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon07_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon08_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon09_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon10_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon11_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(B.mon12_iem_vu, 0) + NVL(A.time_add_excclc_amt, 0) + NVL(B.time_add_excclc_amt, 0) ) AS excclc_amt_total,
MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_nm FROM MAPPING_LIST, ( SELECT excclc_year, bplc_cd_id, iem_nm, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu, time_add_excclc_amt FROM tm_cl24001 WHERE iem_nm = 'bassAmt' AND excclc_year BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ), 0, 4) AND SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ), 0, 4) ) A, ( SELECT excclc_year, bplc_cd_id, iem_nm, mon01_iem_vu, mon02_iem_vu, mon03_iem_vu, mon04_iem_vu, mon05_iem_vu, mon06_iem_vu, mon07_iem_vu, mon08_iem_vu, mon09_iem_vu, mon10_iem_vu, mon11_iem_vu, mon12_iem_vu, time_add_excclc_amt FROM tm_cl24001 WHERE iem_nm = 'acmsltAmt' AND excclc_year BETWEEN SUBSTR(( SELECT MIN(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ), 0, 4) AND SUBSTR(( SELECT MAX(yy_mt) FROM YEAR_MONTH_LIST ), 0, 4) ) B WHERE MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = A.bplc_cd_id(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = B.bplc_cd_id(+) AND SUBSTR(MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt, 0, 4) = A.excclc_year(+) AND SUBSTR(MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt, 0, 4) = B.excclc_year(+) ) SELECT basin_nm, dept_nm, bplc_nm, uswtr_sqty, epwr_usgqty, ROUND(kepco_ntic_cg, 0) AS kepco_ntic_cg, excclc_amt, ROUND(epbu, 4) AS epbu, ROUND(perton_epwr_upc, 4) AS perton_epwr_upc, snpw_elyrs FROM ( SELECT GROUPING(basin_nm) AS basin_grp, GROUPING(dept_nm) AS dept_grp, GROUPING(bplc_nm) AS bplc_grp, CASE WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '전 체 합 계'
WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 1 THEN '합 계' ELSE basin_nm END AS basin_nm, CASE WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '전 체 합 계' WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 0 AND GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '유 역 합 계' WHEN GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 THEN '합 계' ELSE dept_nm END AS dept_nm, CASE WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '전 체 합 계' WHEN GROUPING(basin_nm) = 0 AND GROUPING(dept_nm) = 1 AND GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '유 역 합 계' WHEN GROUPING(bplc_nm) = 1 THEN '합 계' ELSE bplc_nm END AS bplc_nm, NVL(SUM(uswtr_sqty), 0) AS uswtr_sqty, NVL(SUM(epwr_usgqty), 0) AS epwr_usgqty, NVL(SUM(tot_amt), 0) AS kepco_ntic_cg, NVL(SUM(excclc_amt), 0) AS excclc_amt, CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(uswtr_sqty), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(epwr_usgqty), 0) / SUM(uswtr_sqty), 4) ELSE 0 END AS epbu, CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(uswtr_sqty), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((NVL(SUM(tot_amt), 0) - NVL(SUM(excclc_amt), 0)) / SUM(uswtr_sqty), 4) ELSE 0 END AS perton_epwr_upc, NVL(SUM(snpw_elyrs), 0) AS snpw_elyrs,
MAX(basin_sort) AS basin_sort,
MAX(dept_sort) AS dept_sort, MAX(bplc_sort) AS bplc_sort FROM ( SELECT /* LEADING(MAPPING_LIST CNSTQY_DATA_LIST KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST DR_DATA_LIST USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST2 INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST) */ MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt, MAPPING_LIST.basin_nm || '' AS basin_nm, MAPPING_LIST.basin_sort, MAPPING_LIST.dept_sort, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_sort, MAPPING_LIST.dept_nm, MAPPING_LIST.bplc_nm, USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST2.uswtr_sqty AS uswtr_sqty, CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.sum AS epwr_usgqty, KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST.tot_amt AS tot_amt, DR_DATA_LIST.excclc_amt_total AS excclc_amt, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.inhouse_cnsmp_snpw AS snpw_elyrs FROM MAPPING_LIST, CNSTQY_DATA_LIST, KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST, DR_DATA_LIST, ( SELECT yy_mt, bplc_cd, MAX(uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no) AS uswtr_sqty_anlrpt_bplc_no, MAX(uswtr_sqty_nm) AS uswtr_sqty_nm, SUM(uswtr_sqty) AS uswtr_sqty FROM USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST GROUP BY yy_mt, bplc_cd ) USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST2, INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST WHERE --CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.dscfc_nm(+) LIKE '%' || MAPPING_LIST.bplc_nm || '%' MAPPING_LIST.uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no = CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.dscfc_id(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt = CNSTQY_DATA_LIST.yy_mt(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.uswtr_sqty_disc_fclty_no = KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST.dscfc_id(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt = KEPCO_CG_DATA_LIST.dscfc_use_de(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = DR_DATA_LIST.bplc_cd(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt = DR_DATA_LIST.yy_mt(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST2.bplc_cd(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt = USWTR_SQTY_DATA_LIST2.yy_mt(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.bplc_cd = INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.bplc_cd(+) AND MAPPING_LIST.yy_mt = INHOUSE_CNSMP_SNPW_DATA_LIST.yy_mt(+) ) GROUP BY
basin_nm, dept_nm, ROLLUP( bplc_nm )
basin_nm, ROLLUP( dept_nm, bplc_nm )
ROLLUP( basin_nm, dept_nm, bplc_nm )
) ORDER BY basin_sort, dept_sort, bplc_sort, basin_grp, dept_grp, bplc_grp
